name: Yogyakarta
cutscene: Heading south now, into the soul of Java.
Yogyakarta hums along Malioboro Street, old and in no hurry.
One last roll of film to finish the archive.

objects.name: Becak
objects.mission: Frame the three-wheeled cart pedalled by hand

objects.name: Batik Canting
objects.mission: Capture the little copper pen that writes in wax

objects.name: Wayang Kulit
objects.mission: Find the leather puppet that lives in shadow

dialog.speaker: The Dalang
lines: Behind the screen, the leather comes alive and the shadows do the talking.
A whole night of love and war, played out on a lit-up cloth.
He turns a puppet toward you. 'Go on, take it home.'
